about:
I am a Full-Stack Developer at Zero & 1, where I specialize in transforming complex business requirements into high-performance digital ecosystems. My expertise lies in building robust Accounting and ERP systems, including specialized Broker Software and Member Management platforms designed for seamless scalability.

I bridge the gap between technical complexity and aesthetic simplicity. From architecting Dynamic, data-driven sites with intricate backend logic to crafting lightning-fast, high-conversion Static sites, I ensure every project is 'shiny,' professional, and user-centric. Whether I’m automating financial workflows or refining a UI with glassmorphism, my goal is always the same: delivering polished, reliable software that drives business growth

experience.description: Developing and maintaining Accounting ERPs, Brokerage software, and Member Management systems. Integrating E-Way bill APIs and automating business workflows.

projects.title: Les Conseillers — https://lesconseillles.com/
projects.description:
Designed and developed a sophisticated digital platform for Les Conseillers, focusing on establishing a high-authority online presence for professional consulting services. The project prioritizes clarity, professional trust, and a seamless user journey for clients seeking expert advice.

Key Features:

Authority-Driven Design: Created a minimalist and clean UI that emphasizes professional credibility and ease of navigation.

Dynamic Content Management: Integrated a flexible backend architecture that allows for easy updates of service offerings, advisory modules, and client resources.

Performance Optimization: Engineered for high-speed performance and SEO best practices to ensure the platform ranks effectively for consultancy-related searches.

Interactive Lead Funnels: Developed custom contact and consultation forms designed to capture high-quality leads and streamline the advisor-client connection.

projects.title: Wallstudio — https://wallstudio.co.in/
projects.description:
Developed a high-end digital portfolio for Wallstudio, a premier interior design firm. This project was designed to reflect the luxury and creativity of the brand, featuring a 'shiny' aesthetic and a focus on high-resolution visual storytelling.

Key Features:

Dynamic Project Galleries: Engineered a sophisticated gallery system that allows the firm to showcase their renovation and cafe-restaurant design projects with a seamless user experience.

Google Drive API Integration: Implemented a backend solution to fetch and display high-definition project imagery directly from Google Drive, ensuring effortless content management.

Glassmorphic UI: Applied modern 'Shiny' and 'Aesthetic' design principles, utilizing glassmorphism effects to complement the firm’s artistic interior style.

Conversion-Optimized Inquiries: Built a custom inquiry system for renovation consultations, connecting potential clients directly to the design team

projects.title: Zero & 1 — Official Corporate Identity & Service Portal
projects.description:
Developed the official web presence for Zero & 1, a leading software development firm. The project focuses on a high-end professional aesthetic, serving as the primary gateway for clients to explore the company’s expertise in ERP, Accounting, and Custom Software solutions.

Key Features:

Strategic Branding: Designed a clean, high-conversion layout that reflects the firm's precision and commitment to technical excellence.

Service Architecture: A structured showcase of specialized services, from Brokerage software to enterprise-level integrations, optimized for SEO and performance.

Lead Management: Integrated secure, automated contact systems to streamline client inquiries and professional consultations.

Responsive Performance: A fully optimized, mobile-first experience ensuring a seamless presentation across all devices and browsers.

projects.title: Pro-Member Management & Subscription Ecosystem
projects.description:
Designed and deployed a scalable Member Management System to streamline user enrollment, subscription tracking, and community engagement. This platform acts as a centralized hub for organizations to manage their database with precision and ease.

Key Features:

Automated Membership Lifecycle: Fully automated system for member onboarding, renewal alerts, and status tracking (Active/Expired/Pending).

Access Control: Implemented secure, role-based access to ensure sensitive member data is only accessible by authorized administrators.

Engagement Analytics: Integrated dashboard features that provide insights into member growth, retention rates, and demographic distributions.

Communication Hub: Built-in triggers for real-time notifications via WhatsApp and Email, ensuring members stay informed about their status and upcoming events

projects.title: Dynamic Brokerage & Commission Management System
projects.description:
Engineered a high-performance management platform designed specifically for brokers to track transactions, client portfolios, and automated commission structures. This system eliminates manual calculation errors and provides a real-time overview of brokerage health.

Key Features:

Commission Engine: Automated logic to calculate complex brokerage splits, referral fees, and net payouts across varying transaction types.

Member & Client Portfolios: A secure management module to track member history, transaction logs, and personalized broker-client relationships.

Financial Reporting: Instant generation of brokerage statements and transaction summaries, providing transparency for both brokers and their members.

Data Integrity: Implemented a robust backend to handle high-concurrency data entries, ensuring financial records remain consistent and audit-ready

projects.title: Gavyansh Wellness — Enterprise Accounting & Inventory ERP
projects.description:
Developed a comprehensive, multi-branch Accounting ERP tailored for wellness enterprises. The system manages the entire business lifecycle, from stock management and inventory tracking to detailed purchase and sales entries.

Key Features:

Financial Intelligence: Real-time generation of Profit & Loss statements, Balance Sheets, and automated Day Books.

Invoicing System: Dynamic PDF invoice generation with support for multiple branches, custom logos, and instant 'Share to WhatsApp' functionality.

Branch Management: A centralized dashboard allowing the owner to switch between branches with independent branding and stock tracking.

Automation: Automated stock adjustments and tax calculations to ensure 100% financial accuracy.
